calendar.matters:
Plaintiff'S Motion To Amend The Judgment Issued June 9, 2009.
Off Calendar Sep-01-2009 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on plaintiff Daniel L. Balsam's Motion to Amend the Judgment issued June 9, 2009 against defendant travelfleamarket.com, a New York corporation.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Maria Lertora, CSR #11935.

Timothy J. Walton, Esq. appeared with plaintiff and moving party Daniel L. Balsam, who was placed under oath but did not testify.
No appearance by defendant travelfleamarket.com, a New York corporation.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, plaintiff's motion to amend the judgment issued June 9, 2009 is DENIED.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-24-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Timothy Walton, Esq. for and with Plaintiff Daniel l. Balsam, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant Travelfleamarket.com Inc. a New York Corp as follows:
Liquidated Damages $4,000.00
Damages from previous stipulated judgment of $10,000.00
Costs $34.40, Interest to be calculated by counsel then submit the Proposed Judgemtn to Dept. 218 for signature.
